hero.heading: Albident Dental Clinic in Şişli, Istanbul
hero.description: A mid-range general dental clinic: implants, aesthetics, orthodontics, and core dental care. Transparent pricing, warranties, three-language reception.

whyUs.heading: Why Albident
whyUs.qualityBody: Modern materials and equipment, multi-stage quality control at every step of treatment.
whyUs.trustBody: Clear pricing before treatment starts, warranties on major work, no hidden fees.
whyUs.teamBody: Doctors trained and experienced in Europe and Turkey, with ongoing professional development.

Services.metaDescription: All dental services at Albident: implants, veneers, orthodontics, therapy, hygiene, and more. Prices in USD, transparent. Online appointment booking.

hero.heading: Our services
hero.description: Eight areas of adult dentistry: from routine prevention to complex implant work. Transparent prices in USD, warranties, and three-language reception.
